_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored). Holds key path + commission assumptions.
_clv_note: DVN's sold-history JSON has NO sale price (confirmed 2026-06-13). So per-closing commission falls back to avgGci.default below, i.e. CLV ≈ (number of closings) × default GCI — a loyalty/transaction-count value, great for prioritizing repeat clients. Sale price DOES live on FUB Deals, so feed the fub_pull people dump as --people to enrich the most-recent purchase where present. Set avgGci.default to your true average GCI per side.
